data.name: I will obey you, Mistress 2
data.detailed_description:
在关系模拟器 "女主人，我会服从你的 2 "中，重返充满激情和服从的世界。一个名叫汤姆的小男孩搬到了一个新的社区，而带他成为性奴隶的女人--诱人但残忍的女主人玛丽--也搬到了这里。

在这款刺激、快节奏的第一人称游戏中，你将深入了解汤姆在新地方的人际关系和生活。新地方的生活并不像看上去那么简单。一位性感的邻居秘密地从事着网络摄像头模特的职业，而邻居家的男人不仅看起来很可疑，而且还盯上了玛丽太太。只有汤姆能救她。如果他能抽出时间满足她的一切要求的话。毕竟，邻居对他也有计划，而且他似乎并不介意...... 他介意吗？他别无选择。
投入带有 BDSM 元素的情色冒险中，取悦美女，找出邻居隐藏的秘密。

游戏以女性统治内容为主，包括成熟霸道的女主人影响男人的场景、舔阴、BDSM 等。

引人入胜、难以预测的情节，意想不到的曲折。
第一人称游戏，让人完全沉浸在游戏世界中。
能够探索角色并揭示他们的秘密。
情色冒险和角色之间的关系。

data.name: I will obey you, Mistress 2
data.detailed_description:
Return to a world full of passion and submission in the relationship simulator "I Will Obey You, Mistress 2". A young boy named Tom moves to a new neighborhood with the woman who took him into sexual slavery - the seductive but cruel Mistress Mary.

In this exciting and fast-paced first-person game, you'll delve into Tom's relationships and life in a new place. Life in the new place is not as easy as it seems. A sexy neighbor leads a secret career as a webcam model, and the man from the neighborhood not only looks like a suspicious man, but also looks at Mrs. Mary. Only Tom can save her. If he can find the time to fulfill her every whim. And after all, the neighbor has plans for him too, and he doesn't even seem to mind... Does he? He has no choice.
Plunge into an erotic adventure with elements of BDSM, please beautiful women and find out what secrets your neighbors are hiding.

The game is mainly focused on femdom content, including scenes of mature and bossy Mistress's influence on a man, pussy licking, bdsm, etc.

Intriguing and unpredictable plot with unexpected twists and turns.
Full immersion in the game world thanks to the first-person game.
Ability to explore the characters and reveal their secrets.
Erotic adventures and relationships between characters.
